response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit of devotion and the power of the guru's grace - the true path of bhakti is found through the guru's mercy - without the guru's guidance bhakti cannot be achieved - the soul must merge with its true self - only then can it become pure - the holy name of harik is the true word that brings salvation - gene and language are not the only keys to understanding the divine - the spirit is the true guide in this journey - visit the guru and seek his wisdom - the soul will find its way through the light of the guru's teachings - the path of the true devotee is not for the ignorant - the one who does not serve the guru wastes his life - the true seeker finds peace in the guru's presence - the guru is the source of all blessings - the spirit is awakened through the guru's grace - the language of the heart is the only true language - the soul must be free from attachments - the true devotee finds peace in the guru's love - the path of the spirit is illuminated by the guru's guidance - the visit to the guru is the beginning of true enlightenment - the soul is cleansed through the guru's mercy - the spirit is united with the divine - the true path is found through the guru's teachings - the language of the soul is the voice of the divine - the gene of devotion is passed through the guru's grace - the spirit is the true guide on the path of salvation - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the soul finds its purpose through the guru's love - the spirit is the light that guides the way - the language of the heart is the only true language - the gene of devotion is awakened through the guru's grace - the visit to the guru is the first step on the path of salvation - the spirit is the true guide in this journey - the soul is united with the divine through the guru's mercy - the path of the spirit is illuminated by the guru's grace - the visit to the guru is the beginning of true enlightenment - the soul finds its way through the light of the guru's teachings - the language of the heart is the only true language - the gene of devotion is passed through the guru's grace - the spirit is the true guide on the path of salvation - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the soul is cleansed through the guru's mercy - the spirit is united with the divine - the true path is found through
